name: Reflex Dog Treats - Mini Heart Biscuits 350g
description: Reflex Dog Treats - Mini Heart Biscuits are the perfect size dog biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Cereals, Glucose (7.5%), Vegetable Oils & Fats, Meat & Animal By-Products, Minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.6 Oil Content (%) - 5.3 Crude Ash (%) - 3.1 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.7 Sodium (%) - 0.5 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Recommended quantity: max. 10 pieces per day. Individual daily requirement depends on other factors, e.g. age, breed and activity. Keep in a dry, cool place.
